title: thymus serpyllum f. braunii
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. braunii is a subspecies of the wild thyme plant, a low-growing, flowering perennial herb native to Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. braunii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
